creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
oh geez, this patch is in some horrible format.  Please, please only submit patches in unified format in the future.  The bugzilla diff viewer can't even read it.

The PR timed out, so maintainer approval required.
Moving to patch-ready pool now.  pkg-plist may or may not need the @dirrm lines removed by the time this PR is picked up.
